title: 🛌 Dream-Executed Deities
name: Dream-Executed Deities
what_it_is: Gods that only exist inside dreams—entities coded from sleep-thoughts and brought to life by collective unconscious processing.
how_to_use: he sees her only while asleep—but her fingerprints remain on waking flesh
they worship a god that executes itself nightly across all dreams
animation_behavior: Form fades with waking, appears across multiple dreamers, gestures sync across sleeping minds
